abilities.description: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, create a 5/5 colorless Djinn artifact creature token with flying. If you lose the flip, CARDNAME deals 5 damage to you.

effect.description: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, create a 5/5 colorless Djinn artifact creature token with flying. If you lose the flip, CARDNAME deals 5 damage to you.
effect.name: FlipACoin
